title: Atabey Adaptive Baseline
description: Streaming-first 3D+time cell tracking baseline for BioHub. Version 12 uses the validated refined hybrid route: compact samples use component centroids, merged 44b6 samples stay on v9-style local maxima with motion-mutual linking, and merged 6bba samples use bounded CFAR+sidelobe detection capped at 900 detections per timepoint. Local visible-test packaging reproduced the v19 candidate CSV byte-for-byte before push.
